executiveSummary: The scanner detected an issue related to Crawl Complete: 1 Endpoints Discovered. This represents a security risk on the target asset.
riskExplanation: The exposure of this module (crawler) allows external clients to gather detail, potentially assisting in targeted reconnaissance. katana crawled https://supabase.com to depth 2 and discovered 1 URLs.
businessImpact: Allowing legacy properties to persist increases vulnerability rates, potentially leading to compliance failures under modern regulations like PCI-DSS.
attackScenarios: An attacker retrieves the disclosures from crawler to identify misconfigured interfaces and executes tailored exploit scripts.
nextSteps: Review the endpoint list for unintended public exposure
